name: workflow profile registration emits a structured json record for downstream tooling
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules: {}\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/register-profile.sh" --profile profiles/p.yaml --workflow-stage architect --emit json --out result.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"profile":' result.json && grep -q '"stage":"architect"' result.json && echo ok 1>&2
